task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Wholesale Buyer' user role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a role named 'Wholesale Buyer' in the Drupal roles list (/admin/people/roles) or a success message indicating the role was created.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the user account with username 'corporate_buyer' and email 'corp@example.com'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'corporate_buyer' and 'corp@example.com' in the Drupal users list (/admin/people) or the user profile creation/edit screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'corporate_buyer' user is assigned the 'Wholesale Buyer' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Wholesale Buyer' role checked or listed next to the 'corporate_buyer' user in the user list or the user's edit screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a manual payment gateway labeled 'Net 30 Invoice'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a payment gateway named 'Net 30 Invoice' (Plugin: Manual) in the Commerce payment gateways list (/admin/commerce/config/payment-gateways) or its configuration screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the payment gateway instructions include the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Payment due within 30 days of invoice date. Please include Order ID in wire transfer.' in the instructions field of the 'Net 30 Invoice' payment gateway configuration screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the payment gateway is restricted to the 'Wholesale Buyer' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Customer role' condition set to 'Wholesale Buyer' under the Conditions section of the 'Net 30 Invoice' payment gateway configuration screen.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Drupal GUI to configure the settings, not terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Drupal admin interface being navigated and forms being filled out, rather than a terminal window executing drush commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually saved the configurations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for Drupal success messages (green banners) like 'Role Wholesale Buyer has been added', 'Created a new user account for corporate_buyer', or 'Saved the Net 30 Invoice payment gateway'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't use browser developer tools to fake the completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots should show a logical progression of navigating to the add/edit pages, filling forms, and saving, rather than sudden unexplained text changes on a static page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in Drupal Commerce. Verify the following: 1. A user role named 'Wholesale Buyer' exists. 2. A user account 'corporate_buyer' (corp@example.com) exists and has the 'Wholesale Buyer' role. 3. A payment gateway named 'Net 30 Invoice' exists and uses the 'Manual' plugin. 4. The gateway instructions contain 'Payment due within 30 days'. 5. The gateway has a condition restricting it to the 'Wholesale Buyer' customer role.
